title: Feta Revithia Fritters
description: Crunchy, garlicky, and cheesy fritters filled with the goodness of Greek revithia. Perfect for a snack or light lunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine revithia, feta cheese, garlic, flour, and bread crumbs.
Mix well until all ingredients are well combined.
Add a pinch of salt to taste.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few patties to the skillet (do not overcrowd).
Cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
